penalties.description: Video shows only setup materials and ligating loop components, no peg transfer task performance visible.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: The video frames show FLS materials setup including stopwatch, camera equipment, instruments, gauze with marked circle, and ligating loop components with appendages. However, no actual peg transfer task performance is visible. There are no pegs, rings, or transfer board shown. The task appears to be demonstrating different FLS components rather than performing the peg transfer task. Since no peg transfer activity was observed, this is scored as incomplete with zero score.
